title: Fix order cancellation and repositioning logic - Frontend

requirements.summary: Update OpenOrdersPanel and cancel-all mutation to automatically refresh the open orders list after cancellation completes
acceptanceCriteria: After clicking cancel-all in OpenOrdersPanel, the open orders list refetches automatically.
The panel shows an empty state or updated orders list once cancellation is confirmed by the backend.
No stale orders remain visible in the UI after successful cancellation.

file_operations.description: Modify the useCancelAllOrders mutation to invalidate the 'openOrders' query key in its onSuccess callback, ensuring the open orders list refetches immediately after a successful cancel-all operation completes.

Update the OpenOrdersPanel component to handle the loading state during mutation and show appropriate feedback (loading indicator, success message, or error state) while the cancel-all operation is in progress and the orders list is refetching.
